steps.title: Use the first equation
steps.content: Every solution must have $y=0$. That immediately eliminates any ordered pair whose second coordinate is not $0$.

steps.title: Check the remaining point
steps.content:
Substitute $(6,0)$ into the second equation:
$$0=8(6^2-36)$$
$$0=8(36-36)=0$$
So $(6,0)$ satisfies both equations. The answer is C.
